title: PlayerLogger
description: PlayerLog is a versatile and user-friendly Minecraft Forge mod designed for server administrators. It provides essential logging features and convenient server management tools.
body:
The PlayerLog Mod is a versatile and user-friendly Minecraft Forge mod designed for server administrators. It provides essential logging features and convenient server management tools.

Key Features:
Player Activity Logging:
Logs player join and leave events in a dedicated file (playerlog.txt) located in the server's config directory.

Chat Message Logging:
Logs all chat messages in a separate file (messages.txt) for easy monitoring and review.

Periodic Server Messages:
Automatically sends periodic messages to all players on the server. The default interval is 30 seconds, but it can be customized using the /pm setinterval <value> command.

Customizable Periodic Messages:
Allows server administrators to set a custom message for the periodic server messages using the /pm setmsg <message> command.

Web Server Access:
A local web server is hosted at http://localhost/index.html to view server logs and messages conveniently.
Commands:
/pm setinterval <value>: Sets the interval (in seconds) for the periodic server messages.
/pm setmessage <message>: Sets the custom message for the periodic server messages.
Installation:
! It is recommended you delete the PMserver folder in /config/PMserver when updating to a new version !

Download the mod .jar file.
Place the .jar file in the mods directory of your Minecraft server.
Start the server and enjoy enhanced logging and management features!
Compatibility:
Tested and compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1 and Forge 47.3.11.
